tools.name: get_market_data
tools.title: Get market data
tools.description: Live quotes for NIFTY 50, BANK NIFTY, India VIX, Bitcoin, gold and silver, including previous-day OHLC, change, and the gold/silver ratio.

tools.name: get_market_news
tools.title: Get market news
tools.description: Latest financial headlines across Indian markets, Bitcoin, gold, and silver, sorted newest first with source and publish time.

tools.name: get_astro_levels
tools.title: Get astro levels
tools.description: Astrology-derived NIFTY trading levels for the current session: base/upper/lower cycles, moon sign, nakshatra, planetary rows with levels, and bull/bear/retrograde counts.
